target.title: Show unfiltered browse totals
target.body: ## Summary - Show compact total counts on `/skills`, `/plugins`, and `/publishers` only when no browse filters or search are active. - Hide totals for filtered/search states and keep the old loaded-result copy removed. - Add an inline `X` clear control to the Skills, Plugins, and Publishers search fields. - Make the Plugins browse shell render immediately, then load catalog data client-side so Skills -> Plugins navigation responds quickly. - Maintain plugin totals through global stats and hide the plugin count until the first full reconciliation has populated it. - Keep `Recommended` as the first/default sort choice on Skills and Plugins, including searched states, so the sort label does not flicker to `Relevance` while typing. - Make Plugins search update while typing and keep `Recently updated` as an explicit non-default sort option. - Use a shared weighted recommendation score for Skills and Plugins so downloads, installs, and stars all contribute without field-precedence sorting. Keep old rank indexes as fallback until score backfills complete. - Add bounded dry-run backfills for skill digest and plugin package recommendation scores. ## A/B UI Proof Playwright compared `https://clawhub.ai` against this PR on localhost at `1440x900` in dark mode. Skills and Publishers localhost were pointed at the live Convex backend so the proof uses production-sized browse data. Plugins uses the local Convex backend because this PR adds the plugin total-count function that is not deployed on production Convex yet. ### `/skills` | Production | This PR | | --- | --- | | | | Production title count: `70.4k`. This PR title count: `70.4K` with live Convex data. ### `/skills?q=agent` | Production | This PR | | --- | --- | | | | Production still shows title count `70.4k`. This PR hides the title count and shows the inline search clear `X`. ### `/plugins` | Production | This PR | | --- | --- | | | | Production title count: `100+`. This PR exact title count: `251` from local Convex data. ### `/plugins?q=github` | Production | This PR | | --- | --- | | | | Production changes the title count to filtered result count `9`. This PR hides the title count and shows the inline search clear `X`. ### `/publishers` | Production | This PR | | --- | --- | | | | Both show unfiltered title count `499` with live Convex data. ### `/publishers?q=ope` | Production | This PR | | --- | --- | | | | Production still shows title count `499`, `Showing all 19 publishers`, and `Clear`. This PR hides the title count, removes the extra copy/control, and shows the inline search clear `X`. The important behavior: unfiltered pages show a total, filtered/search pages hide the title count, and the misleading loaded/showing copy is gone. Raw proof files: - Gist with individual proof images: https://gist.github.com/jesse-merhi/f221735bed3d2d7f40c5ee4da0fdbc0d - Dark-mode local files: `/tmp/clawhub-ab-proof-dark/*.png`, `/tmp/clawhub-ab-proof-dark/metrics.json` ## Verification - `bunx convex codegen` - `bun run test src/__tests__/skills-index.test.tsx src/__tests__/packages-route.test.tsx src/__tests__/publishers-route.test.tsx src/lib/packageApi.test.ts convex/statsMaintenance.test.ts convex/httpApiV1.handlers.test.ts convex/lib/packageSearchDigest.test.ts convex/packages.countPublicPlugins.test.ts` - `bun run test src/__tests__/skills-index.test.tsx src/__tests__/packages-route.test.tsx src/__tests__/publishers-route.test.tsx` - `bunx tsc --noEmit --pretty false` - `bun run ci:static` - `bun run ci:unit` - `bun run ci:types-build` - `git diff --check` - `bun run format:check` - Playwright focused clear-button layout audit at `390x844`, `768x1024`, and `1440x900` for `/skills?q=agent`, `/plugins?q=github`, and `/publishers?q=ope`: no horizontal overflow; clear buttons stayed inside the search fields without overlapping input text. - Playwright sort/search audit at `390x844`, `768x1024`, and `1440x900` for `/skills`, `/skills?q=agent`, `/plugins`, and `/plugins?q=github`: `Recommended` was first and active by default, searched states did not show `Relevance`, and Plugins typing updated the URL to `/plugins?q=github`. - Playwright dark-mode A/B proof regenerated for `/skills`, `/skills?q=agent`, `/plugins`, `/plugins?q=github`, `/publishers`, and `/publishers?q=ope`. - Autoreview: no actionable correctness issues reported; the helper footer still returned a false positive exit after clean review text. - `bun run test convex/lib/recommendationScore.test.ts convex/lib/skillSearchDigest.test.ts convex/skills.listPublicPageV4.test.ts convex/packages.public.test.ts convex/packages.stats.test.ts convex/httpApiV1.handlers.test.ts convex/functions.test.ts convex/statsMaintenance.test.ts` - `bun run test convex/skills.publicListCursor.test.ts` - `VITE_CONVEX_URL=https://example.invalid bun run coverage` - `bunx tsc --noEmit` - `NPM_CONFIG_REGISTRY=https://registry.npmjs.org BUN_CONFIG_REGISTRY=https://registry.npmjs.org bun run deadcode:ci` ## UI Checks - Skills and Publishers proof used `http://127.0.0.1:3004/` with `https://wry-manatee-359.convex.cloud`; `skills:countPublicSkills` returned `70338` earlier in this PR. - Plugins proof used `http://127.0.0.1:3002/` with local Convex data; `packages:countPublicPluginsInternal` returned `251`. - Verified filtered Skills, Plugins, and Publishers hide the title count. - Verified filtered Skills, Plugins, and Publishers show inline search clear controls. - Verified `/publishers?q=ope` returns live matches on the PR frontend when pointed at live Convex data. - Verified Skills -> Plugins shell rendered with the loading skeleton visible. - Verified Plugins search typing navigates to `?q=github`, keeps the typed value, and leaves `Recommended` active. - Verified mobile filter-open state keeps `Recommended` first for searched Plugins. - Checked responsive layouts at `390x844`, `768x1024`, and `1440x900`. - `npx --yes impeccable detect src/routes/skills/index.tsx src/routes/plugins/index.tsx src/routes/publishers/index.tsx --json` returned `[]`. A broader scan including `src/styles.css` reported pre-existing unrelated global CSS warnings outside this change. - Playwright saw the existing local React hydration warning for theme attributes on `` when forcing dark mode before hydration; production did not log console errors in this pass.
target.author: jesse-merhi
